description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of BAND-AID Flexible Fabric bandages, predominantly blue and white in color, with bold red and white branding on the front. The front face displays the BAND-AID logo in large red letters, with 'FLEXIBLE FABRIC' in white text below, and an image of two tan-colored, perforated bandages. The box contains 50 assorted sizes, as indicated by the text, and features a small red and white ParaMed logo in the lower left corner. The top of the box is blue with 'BAND-AID' printed in white, while the sides and back are plain blue with no additional graphics or text. The box appears to be made of lightweight cardboard and is likely hollow inside, designed to hold individually wrapped bandages.
description: A blue and white rectangular BAND-AID box with bold branding and images of tan, perforated bandages on the front. The packaging is clean, simple, and designed for easy identification.
description_view_0: Front view showing the BAND-AID logo, product description, ParaMed logo, and images of two tan, perforated bandages.
description_view_1: Side view showing a plain white and blue surface with no visible graphics or text.
description_view_2: Back view showing a solid blue surface with 'BAND-AID' in white at the top, no other markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain white and blue surface and no graphics.
attribute_brand_logo: BAND-AID logo in large red letters on the front, ParaMed logo in red and white at the lower left front corner.
attribute_packaging_design: Rectangular box with a blue top and upper half, white lower half, and bold red 'BAND-AID' text. The front features product information in white, images of two tan, perforated bandages, and a small ParaMed logo. Sides and back are plain blue or white with minimal text.
attribute_adhesive_strip_pattern: The adhesive strip images on the front show a tan color with evenly spaced small perforations running down the center.
